title: lithodora diffusa subsp. lusitanica
intro: Lithodora diffusa subsp. lusitanica, also known as blue meadow germander or blue pimpernel, is a flowering plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithodora diffusa subsp. lusitanica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
